description: You are a mechatronics engineer implementing a Python process controller for an automated bottling line. The project 'process_controller' is located at /home/ga/PycharmProjects/process_controller/. The project uses a finite state machine (FSM) framework to manage the bottling process through various states including IDLE, INITIALIZING, FILLING, SEALING, LABELING, INSPECTING, COMPLETE, ERROR, and EMERGENCY_STOP. Complete the implementation of the StateMachine class in controller/machine.py, the sensor-based guard functions in controller/guards.py, and the state-transition action functions in controller/actions.py. Your implementation must correctly handle event processing, transition registration, guard validation, and context updates according to the specifications found in the project's docstrings and existing test suite. The state/event enumerations in controller/states.py are already provided. The task is complete when all tests in the tests/ directory pass.
